Grand Total Store Sales:
SELECT 
  COALESCE(Store, 'GRAND TOTAL') as Store,
  COUNT(*) as Rows,
  CAST(SUM(CAST("Qty Sold" AS DECIMAL(18,2))) AS DECIMAL(18,2)) as Qty,
  CAST(SUM(CAST("Qty Sold" AS DECIMAL(18,2)) * CAST(Price AS DECIMAL(18,2))) AS DECIMAL(18,2)) as "Total Price",
  CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN CAST("Qty Sold" AS DECIMAL(18,2)) * CAST(Price AS DECIMAL(18,2)) < 0 THEN CAST("Qty Sold" AS DECIMAL(18,2)) * CAST(Price AS DECIMAL(18,2)) ELSE 0 END) AS DECIMAL(18,2)) as "Neg Total"
FROM dataset
GROUP BY ROLLUP(Store)
ORDER BY Store IS NULL, Store
Store Sales (Date Range):
SELECT 
  COALESCE(Store, 'GRAND TOTAL') as Store,
  COUNT(*) as Rows,
  CAST(SUM(CAST("Qty Sold" AS DECIMAL(18,2))) AS DECIMAL(18,2)) as Qty,
  CAST(SUM(CAST("Qty Sold" AS DECIMAL(18,2)) * CAST(Price AS DECIMAL(18,2))) AS DECIMAL(18,2)) as "Total Price",
  CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN CAST("Qty Sold" AS DECIMAL(18,2)) * CAST(Price AS DECIMAL(18,2)) < 0 THEN CAST("Qty Sold" AS DECIMAL(18,2)) * CAST(Price AS DECIMAL(18,2)) ELSE 0 END) AS DECIMAL(18,2)) as "Neg Total"
FROM dataset
WHERE CAST("Invoice Date" AS DATE) >= '2024-01-01'
  AND CAST("Invoice Date" AS DATE) <= '2026-04-01'
GROUP BY ROLLUP(Store)
ORDER BY Store IS NULL, Store
invoice feb:
SELECT *
FROM t_06_invoices_detail
WHERE "Invoice Date" BETWEEN DATE '2026-02-01' AND DATE '2026-02-28'
ORDER BY "Invoice Date", "Invoice #";
epicor feb:
SELECT *
FROM Feb_Epicor_Transactions
WHERE TRY_CAST("Date" AS DATE) BETWEEN DATE '2026-02-01' AND DATE '2026-02-28'
ORDER BY TRY_CAST("Date" AS DATE), "PO#";
header feb:
SELECT *
FROM t_05_invoices_header
WHERE "Invoice Date" BETWEEN DATE '2026-02-01' AND DATE '2026-02-28'
ORDER BY "Invoice Date", "Invoice #";
summary:
WITH epicor_ids AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT "PO#" AS trx_id
    FROM Feb_Epicor_Transactions
    WHERE "PO#" IS NOT NULL
      AND TRY_CAST("Date" AS DATE) BETWEEN DATE '2026-02-01' AND DATE '2026-02-28'
),
header_ids AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT "Invoice #" AS trx_id
    FROM t_05_invoices_header
    WHERE "Invoice #" IS NOT NULL
      AND "Invoice Date" BETWEEN DATE '2026-02-01' AND DATE '2026-02-28'
),
detail_ids AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT "Invoice #" AS trx_id
    FROM t_06_invoices_detail
    WHERE "Invoice #" IS NOT NULL
      AND "Invoice Date" BETWEEN DATE '2026-02-01' AND DATE '2026-02-28'
)
SELECT 'Total Epicor rows'                   AS metric, COUNT(*)        AS value FROM Feb_Epicor_Transactions WHERE TRY_CAST("Date" AS DATE) BETWEEN DATE '2026-02-01' AND DATE '2026-02-28'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Total Header rows',                              COUNT(*)               FROM t_05_invoices_header   WHERE "Invoice Date" BETWEEN DATE '2026-02-01' AND DATE '2026-02-28'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Total Detail rows',                              COUNT(*)               FROM t_06_invoices_detail   WHERE "Invoice Date" BETWEEN DATE '2026-02-01' AND DATE '2026-02-28'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Distinct Epicor PO#',                            COUNT(*)               FROM epicor_ids
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Distinct Header Invoice #',                      COUNT(*)               FROM header_ids
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Distinct Detail Invoice #',                      COUNT(*)               FROM detail_ids
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Header invoices missing from Epicor',            COUNT(*)               FROM header_ids WHERE trx_id NOT IN (SELECT trx_id FROM epicor_ids)
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Epicor PO# missing from Header',                 COUNT(*)               FROM epicor_ids WHERE trx_id NOT IN (SELECT trx_id FROM header_ids)
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Header invoices missing from Detail',            COUNT(*)               FROM header_ids WHERE trx_id NOT IN (SELECT trx_id FROM detail_ids)
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Detail invoices missing from Header',            COUNT(*)               FROM detail_ids WHERE trx_id NOT IN (SELECT trx_id FROM header_ids)
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Avg detail lines per invoice',                   ROUND(AVG(line_count), 2) FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) AS line_count FROM t_06_invoices_detail WHERE "Invoice Date" BETWEEN DATE '2026-02-01' AND DATE '2026-02-28' GROUP BY "Invoice #")
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Duplicate Epicor rows (same PO#)',               COUNT(*) - COUNT(DISTINCT "PO#") FROM Feb_Epicor_Transactions WHERE TRY_CAST("Date" AS DATE) BETWEEN DATE '2026-02-01' AND DATE '2026-02-28' AND "PO#" IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Duplicate Header rows (same Invoice #)',         COUNT(*) - COUNT(DISTINCT "Invoice #") FROM t_05_invoices_header WHERE "Invoice Date" BETWEEN DATE '2026-02-01' AND DATE '2026-02-28' AND "Invoice #" IS NOT NULL;
